targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS "Readings"
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sensor_id)::BIGINT AS "Active Sensors"
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT source)::BIGINT AS "Sources"
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}';

SELECT COALESCE(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN quality_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 0)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "Valid %"
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}';

SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(time))) / 60.0 AS "Latest Age"
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}';

SELECT COALESCE((SELECT dropped_readings_total FROM ingestion_metrics ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1), 0)::BIGINT AS "Dropped"
;

WITH ops AS (
  SELECT
    recorded_at AS "time",
    'Readings/sec' AS metric,
    readings_per_second AS value
  FROM ingestion_metrics
  WHERE $__timeFilter(recorded_at)
), fallback AS (
  SELECT
    time_bucket('1 minute', time) AS "time",
    'Readings/sec' AS metric,
    (COUNT(*)::DOUBLE PRECISION / 60.0) AS value
  FROM sensor_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ops)
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT * FROM ops
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM fallback
ORDER BY "time";

WITH ops AS (
  SELECT
    recorded_at AS "time",
    'Channel Fill' AS metric,
    channel_fill_pct AS value
  FROM ingestion_metrics
  WHERE $__timeFilter(recorded_at)
), fallback AS (
  SELECT
    time_bucket('1 minute', time) AS "time",
    'Channel Fill' AS metric,
    0::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
  FROM sensor_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ops)
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT * FROM ops
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM fallback
ORDER BY "time";

WITH ops AS (
  SELECT
    recorded_at AS "time",
    'Dropped Total' AS metric,
    dropped_readings_total AS value
  FROM ingestion_metrics
  WHERE $__timeFilter(recorded_at)
), fallback AS (
  SELECT
    time_bucket('1 minute', time) AS "time",
    'Dropped Total' AS metric,
    0::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
  FROM sensor_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ops)
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT * FROM ops
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM fallback
ORDER BY "time";

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', time) AS "time",
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS metric,
  AVG(value)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
  AND metric = 'PM2.5'
  AND quality_flag = 1
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', time) AS "time",
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS metric,
  AVG(value)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
  AND metric = 'O3'
  AND quality_flag = 1
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', time) AS "time",
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS metric,
  AVG(value)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
  AND metric = 'NO2'
  AND quality_flag = 1
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', time) AS "time",
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS metric,
  AVG(value)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
  AND metric = 'temperature'
  AND quality_flag = 1
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', time) AS "time",
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS metric,
  AVG(value)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
  AND metric = 'humidity'
  AND quality_flag = 1
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', time) AS "time",
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS metric,
  AVG(value)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
  AND metric = 'wind_speed'
  AND quality_flag = 1
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', time) AS "time",
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS metric,
  AVG(value)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
  AND metric = 'precipitation'
  AND quality_flag = 1
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', time) AS "time",
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS metric,
  AVG(value)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
  AND metric = 'water_gage_height'
  AND quality_flag = 1
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', time) AS "time",
  'Divvy Bike Share' AS metric,
  SUM(value)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
  AND metric = 'bike_available_count'
  AND quality_flag = 1
  AND source = 'gbfs'
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', time) AS "time",
  'Divvy Bike Share' AS metric,
  SUM(value)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
  AND metric = 'dock_available_count'
  AND quality_flag = 1
  AND source = 'gbfs'
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', time) AS "time",
  'Divvy Bike Share' AS metric,
  SUM(value)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
  AND metric = 'station_capacity'
  AND quality_flag = 1
  AND source = 'gbfs'
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;

WITH station_buckets AS (
  SELECT
    time_bucket('5 minutes', time) AS bucket,
    sensor_id,
    MAX(value) FILTER (WHERE metric = 'bike_available_count') AS bikes,
    MAX(value) FILTER (WHERE metric = 'station_capacity') AS capacity
  FROM sensor_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
    AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
    AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
    AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
    AND source = 'gbfs'
    AND metric IN ('bike_available_count', 'station_capacity')
    AND quality_flag = 1
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT
  bucket AS "time",
  'Divvy Bike Share' AS metric,
  COALESCE(100.0 * SUM(bikes) / NULLIF(SUM(capacity), 0), 0)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM station_buckets
GROUP BY bucket
ORDER BY bucket;

SELECT
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS source,
  COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS readings
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
GROUP BY source
ORDER BY readings DESC;

SELECT
  CASE metric
    WHEN 'PM2.5' THEN 'PM2.5'
    WHEN 'O3' THEN 'Ozone'
    WHEN 'NO2' THEN 'Nitrogen Dioxide'
    WHEN 'temperature' THEN 'Temperature'
    WHEN 'humidity' THEN 'Humidity'
    WHEN 'wind_speed' THEN 'Wind Speed'
    WHEN 'precipitation' THEN 'Precipitation'
    WHEN 'bike_available_count' THEN 'Available Bikes'
    WHEN 'dock_available_count' THEN 'Open Docks'
    WHEN 'station_capacity' THEN 'Station Capacity'
    WHEN 'water_gage_height' THEN 'River Gage Height'
    ELSE metric
  END AS metric,
  COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS readings
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
GROUP BY metric
ORDER BY readings DESC;

SELECT
  sensor_id,
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS source,
  AVG(latitude)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS latitude,
  AVG(longitude)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS longitude,
  COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS readings,
  MAX(time) AS latest_reading_at
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
GROUP BY sensor_id, source
ORDER BY latest_reading_at DESC;

SELECT
  sensor_id,
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS source,
  COUNT(DISTINCT metric)::INTEGER AS metrics,
  COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS readings,
  COALESCE(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN quality_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 0)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS valid_pct,
  MAX(time) AS latest_reading_at,
  CASE WHEN MAX(time) >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' THEN 'Fresh' ELSE 'Stale' END AS status
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
GROUP BY sensor_id, source
ORDER BY latest_reading_at DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT ON (sensor_id, metric)
  time,
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS source,
  sensor_id,
  CASE metric
    WHEN 'PM2.5' THEN 'PM2.5'
    WHEN 'O3' THEN 'Ozone'
    WHEN 'NO2' THEN 'Nitrogen Dioxide'
    WHEN 'temperature' THEN 'Temperature'
    WHEN 'humidity' THEN 'Humidity'
    WHEN 'wind_speed' THEN 'Wind Speed'
    WHEN 'precipitation' THEN 'Precipitation'
    WHEN 'bike_available_count' THEN 'Available Bikes'
    WHEN 'dock_available_count' THEN 'Open Docks'
    WHEN 'station_capacity' THEN 'Station Capacity'
    WHEN 'water_gage_height' THEN 'River Gage Height'
    ELSE metric
  END AS metric,
  value,
  unit,
  CASE quality_flag WHEN 1 THEN 'Valid' WHEN 0 THEN 'Suspect' ELSE 'Invalid' END AS quality
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
ORDER BY sensor_id, metric, time DESC
LIMIT 200;

SELECT
  CASE quality_flag WHEN 1 THEN 'Valid' WHEN 0 THEN 'Suspect' ELSE 'Invalid' END AS quality,
  COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS readings
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
GROUP BY quality_flag
ORDER BY quality;

SELECT
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS source,
  COALESCE(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN quality_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 0)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS valid_pct
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
GROUP BY source
ORDER BY valid_pct ASC;

WITH exceptions AS (
  SELECT
    time,
    CASE source
      WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
      WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
      WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
      WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
      WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
      ELSE source
    END AS source,
    sensor_id,
    CASE metric
      WHEN 'PM2.5' THEN 'PM2.5'
      WHEN 'O3' THEN 'Ozone'
      WHEN 'NO2' THEN 'Nitrogen Dioxide'
      WHEN 'temperature' THEN 'Temperature'
      WHEN 'humidity' THEN 'Humidity'
      WHEN 'wind_speed' THEN 'Wind Speed'
      WHEN 'precipitation' THEN 'Precipitation'
      WHEN 'bike_available_count' THEN 'Available Bikes'
      WHEN 'dock_available_count' THEN 'Open Docks'
      WHEN 'station_capacity' THEN 'Station Capacity'
      WHEN 'water_gage_height' THEN 'River Gage Height'
      ELSE metric
    END AS metric,
    value::TEXT AS value,
    unit,
    CASE quality_flag WHEN 0 THEN 'Suspect' ELSE 'Invalid' END AS quality
  FROM sensor_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
    AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
    AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
    AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
    AND quality_flag <> 1
  ORDER BY time DESC
  LIMIT 50
), clean_audit AS (
  SELECT
    NOW() AS time,
    'All Sources' AS source,
    'All Sensors' AS sensor_id,
    'All Metrics' AS metric,
    '0' AS value,
    'exceptions' AS unit,
    'Clean audit: no suspect or invalid readings in the selected window' AS quality
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM exceptions)
)
SELECT * FROM exceptions
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM clean_audit
ORDER BY time DESC;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT source FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Source
list.name: source
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT source FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT metric FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Metric
list.name: metric
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT metric FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT sensor_id FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Sensor
list.name: sensor_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT sensor_id FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY 1;
